title: Shopping for clothes
explanation:
Shopping for clothes

Listen to a customer in a clothes shop.

Transcript

Assistant: Can I help you?
Customer: Yes, I'm looking for a blue shirt.
Assistant: What size are you?
Customer: Medium, please.
Assistant: Here you are. The changing rooms are over there.
Customer: Thanks. How much is it?
Assistant: It's twenty-five pounds.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen and choose the correct answer.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen again and choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The assistant asks: 'Can I ____ you?' | *help | take | go
The customer is ____ for a shirt. | *looking | going | turning
The ____ rooms are over there. | *changing | waiting | meeting
The customer asks: 'How ____ is it?' | *much | many | long

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: The conversation is in a [*clothes shop|restaurant|bank].
The assistant asks about [*size|colour|price] first after the item.
The customer can try the shirt in the [*changing room|kitchen|office].
The customer asks the price [*at the end|at the start|never].
questions.feedback: How much is it? — at the end.
